message:
refactor(config): move burst_min_confidence to PredictionConfig

Add burst_min_confidence field (default 0.85) to PredictionConfig,
replacing the misplaced burst_confidence_penalty in TelemetryConfig.
PredictiveActionPolicy now reads from its own config instead of using
a hardcoded value.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
